raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es ne fuhtiju tohs Pra-
weeschus/ un tomehr tee tezzeja/
es ne runnaju/ un tomehr tee
fluddinaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet buhtu tee eekſch man-
na Padohma stahwejschi/ tad
buhtu tee mannu Wahrdü man-
neem Laudim ſinnann darriſ-
fchi/ un buhtu tohs nogreesfutchi
no winno fauna Zelta/ un no
winno faunahm Darrifchanahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neggi es eſmu weens
Deews kas tuwu irr? tafka tas
KUNGS: Un neggt weene
Deews/ kas tahtu irr?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Warr arridsan kas tab-
ban apſlebptäs Weetäs twer-
tees/ ka es to ne redsetu? fakka
tas KUNGS: Neggi es to
Debbefi/ un to Semmi peepildu?
fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſmu to dsirdejs/ fo
tee Praweetchi fakka/ kas eekſch
mannu Wahrdä Mellus fluddi-
na/ un fakka: Es eſmu Sapni
redſejs/ es eſmu Sapni redſejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zik ilgi tas buhs eekſch to
Praweefchu Sirdi/ kas Mellus
fluddina? un fluddina ſawas
Sirds Wiltibu/ un irr ſirdswil-
tigi Praweefchi no Sirdsdib-
bina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas uhs to dohdahs/ ka
manneem Laudim buhs mannu
Wahrdü aismirst zaur wiawu
Sapneem/ fo ikweens ſawam
Tuwakam stahsta/ ka winnu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Laid tas Praweets/ kas
Sapnus reds/ Sapnus stahsta/
un pee ka mans Wahrdä irr/
tas laid mannu Wahrdü pateefi
runna. Kas irr tahm Bellum
ar Labbibu jadarra? tafka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Woj mans Wahrdä ne
irr ta ka ugguns? fakka tas
KUNGS: Un ka weens Wee-
fers/ kas Akmita-Kalnus fa-
grausch?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht reds/ Es zelschohs
prett teem Praweefcheem/ fakka
tas KUNGS: Kas mannu
Wahrdus ſohg/ ikweens no fa-
wa Tuwaka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ Es zelschohs prett
teem Praweefcheem/ fakka tas
KUNGS: Kas jawus paſchus
Wahrdus runna/ un fakka:
Wiſsch irr to runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ Es zelschohs prett
teem/ kas nepateetus Sapnue
fluddina/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Un ſtahſta tohs/ un peewilt man-
nus Laudis ar faweem Melleem/
un ar fawahm ſchiglahm Bleh-
nahm/ kur es tomehr tohs ne ef-
mu fuhtijs/ un teem neneeka pa-
wehlejs/ un fcheem Laudim wiffa-
leeti ne derr/ fakka tas KUNgs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu ſchee Laudis/ je-
kahds Praweets/ jeb Preesteris
tew waizahs/ un fazzihs: Kurra
irr ta KUNGA Nasta? Ta-
buhs tew uhs teem fazziht
(Jautajeet juhs) kas ta Nasta-
irr
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
